name: OpenSSF Scorecard: Dangerous-Workflow
description: Detect dangerous patterns in GitHub Actions workflows such as pull_request_target with explicit checkout of PR head, untrusted input in run commands via ${{ github.event }}, and script injection vectors that allow arbitrary code execution by external contributors.
match: pull_request_target with PR checkout, untrusted ${{ github.event.* }} in run steps, workflow_run with unsafe context
replacement: use pull_request trigger instead, pass untrusted input via environment variables, validate all external input
